old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-n31b.2","title":"Trace T-Echo GNSS PPS connectivity","description":"Trace GNSS 1PPS nets through each official schematic/PCB artifact to nRF52840 pins and exposed pads or headers.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-20T18:55:31.695427Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-20T18:55:31.695427Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-n31b.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-n31b","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T18:55:31.835484Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Routing: classic/Plus L76K pin 4 1PPS via R0 1K net PPS to nRF P1.04; Air530 alternate also maps PPS to P1.04. No classic/Plus PPS connector/test-point shown. Lite V1.0 GPS_1PPS maps external 1x7 P1.15 and KiCad through-hole pad 2 to nRF P1.15. Card V1.0 L76K 1PPS net GPS_PPS_P0.23 reaches nRF P0.23; no PPS connector/test-point shown."}
